description_long: This object is a modern electric clothes iron with a blue and white plastic body and a metallic soleplate. The handle is ergonomically shaped, open, and integrated into the main body, featuring a smooth surface and a visible control knob near the front. The soleplate is silver with a detailed pattern of steam vents arranged in rows and clusters, designed for efficient steam distribution. A black power cord extends from the rear, appearing moderately thick and flexible, suitable for household use. The iron's overall design is sleek and functional, with a slightly pointed tip for precision ironing. A brand logo is visible on the lower part of the soleplate, adding a touch of branding to the otherwise utilitarian appearance.
description: A blue and white electric clothes iron with a metallic soleplate featuring a patterned array of steam vents and an ergonomic open handle. The iron includes a visible control knob and a black power cord extending from the rear.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the metallic soleplate with its intricate pattern of steam vents and a visible brand logo at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the blue plastic body, the open handle, and the thin profile of the soleplate.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the iron, the attachment point of the black power cord, and the overall symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the handle's contour and the iron's slim profile.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is open, integrated into the main body, and made of blue plastic with a smooth, contoured surface for ergonomic grip. It features a visible control knob near the front and appears comfortable for prolonged use.
attribute_soleplate_pattern: The soleplate is silver with a symmetrical pattern of small circular and oval steam holes arranged in rows and clusters, with additional grooves and channels for steam distribution. The design is both functional and visually distinctive.
attribute_cord_type: A black power cord is attached at the rear, moderately thick and flexible, with visible strain relief at the attachment point. The cord appears fixed and suitable for standard household use.
attribute_steam_vent_arrangement: The steam vents are organized in multiple rows and clusters along the soleplate, with smaller holes near the tip and larger ones toward the center and sides, providing even steam coverage.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the lower part of the soleplate, featuring a small, dark emblem with readable text.
